english translation text:
Dua “Ilahi ta’arradha laka fi haazallaylil muta’rridhoon”
Tofatus Saaemeen p347d/p349

Oh Allah if you are going to favour  and show your kindness on this night to any of your creation then send salawaat on Muhammad and Aaale Muhammad and please be generous on me and forgive me and bestow your favours on me.
In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: Oh Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: إلهِي تَعَرَّضَ لَكَ فِي هذَا اللَّيْلِ الْمُتَعَرِّضُونَ،
english translation text: Oh Allah: tonight the seekers of favors, restless and eager, present themselves to You;
the determined aspirers have You in mind;
those who make requests look long and attentively at Your obligingness and kindness;

arabic text: وَلَكَ فِي هذَا اللَّيْلِ نَفَحَاتٌ وَجَوَائِزُ
english translation text: You, in this night, give gifts, bounties beyond measure,
free donations, and favors,

arabic text: تَمُنُّ بِهَا عَلَى مَنْ تَشَاءُ مِنْ عِبَادِكَ،
english translation text: to those whom You will from among Your servants when they make a request,

arabic text: وَتَمْنَعُهَا مَنْ لَمْ تَسْبِقْ لَهُ الْعِنَايَةُ مِنْكَ،
english translation text: and say no to those who do not try to get in advance (remain behind) for obtaining the bounties from You.

arabic text: وَهَا أَنَا ذَا عُبَيْدُكَ الْفَقِيرُ إلَيْكَ
english translation text: I, a modest needy bondman,
am hopeful of Your obligingness and kindness.

arabic text: فَإنْ كُنْتَ يَا مَوْلايَ تَفَضَّلْتَ فِي هذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ عَلَى أَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
english translation text: Indeed if You, Oh My Master, bestows a favor on any one, in this night, from among Your created beings,
and multiply profits and gains for him out of love and affection,
please send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad:
the pure, the immaculate, the virtuous, and the righteous;
and then let me have enough and be contented on account of Your liberality and obligingness,
Oh Lord of the worlds!

arabic text: وَصَلَّى اللّهُ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ خَاتَمِ النَّبِيِّينَ
english translation text: May Allah send blessings upon Muhammad, the seal of the Prophets,
and upon his Household, the immaculate,
and may He exalt them very much.
verily, Allah is worthy of all praise, full of all glory.
Oh Allah: I am praying You as You ordered me to do,
So, (please) respond to me as You promised.
verily, You never break Your promise.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: Oh Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
